name: onpay-mcp
description: Query OnPay sales records and update shipping info from your AI assistant.
long_description: An MCP server for the OnPay API. Exposes three tools — list sales, get a sale, and update shipping info — to any compatible AI client. Unofficial, community-maintained.

tools.name: sales_get
tools.description: Get a single sale record by ID.

tools.name: sales_update_shipping_info
tools.description: Set courier + tracking code for a sale.

onpay_account.title: Account Subdomain
onpay_account.description: The 'acme' in https://acme.onpay.my. Fill this OR Base URL.

onpay_base_url.title: Custom Domain Base URL
onpay_base_url.description: Full API base URL if you use a custom domain, e.g. https://shop.example.com/api/v1. Fill this OR Account Subdomain.
